<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; /** * Represents a cut array. * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ class CutArrayStub extends CutStub { public array $preservedSubset; public function __construct(array $value, array $preservedKeys) { parent::__construct($value); $this->preservedSubset = array_intersect_key($value, array_flip($preservedKeys)); $this->cut -= \count($this->preservedSubset); } }
